title_zh: OpenAI模型推翻离散几何中的核心猜想
title_en: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
summary_zh: 一款OpenAI模型解决了有80年历史的单位距离问题，推翻了离散几何中的一个重要猜想，标志着人工智能在数学领域的重大突破。
summary_en: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.
why_it_matters_zh: 这一成果展示了AI在复杂数学问题上的强大能力，推动了数学研究的新方向。
why_it_matters_en: This achievement demonstrates AI's powerful capability in tackling complex mathematical problems, advancing new directions in mathematical research.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry. Category: models_products. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: OpenAI教育助力计划迈入新阶段
title_en: The Next Phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
summary_zh: OpenAI推进“教育助力计划”，通过新合作伙伴关系、教师培训及工具，促进全球学校采用AI技术，提升学习效果。
summary_en: OpenAI advances Education for Countries by expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.
why_it_matters_zh: 人工智能在教育领域的应用潜力巨大，OpenAI的计划旨在普及AI技术，帮助各国提升教学质量和学生学习体验。
why_it_matters_en: AI has great potential in education; OpenAI’s initiative aims to popularize AI technology to help countries enhance teaching quality and student learning experience.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: The Next Phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: Ramp工程师如何用Codex加速代码审查
title_en: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex
summary_zh: Ramp的工程师使用搭载GPT-5.5的Codex进行代码审查和改进，能够在几分钟内获得实质性反馈，而不是花费数小时。
summary_en: Ramp engineers leverage Codex powered by GPT-5.5 to review code and implement improvements, enabling them to receive substantive feedback within minutes instead of hours.
why_it_matters_zh: 这大幅提升了代码审查效率，缩短了开发周期，提高了产品质量。
why_it_matters_en: This significantly improves code review efficiency, shortens development cycles, and enhances product quality.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

summary_zh: OpenAI for Singapore启动了一项多年期的人工智能合作伙伴关系，旨在扩大部署，培养本地人才，并通过人工智能支持企业和公共服务。
summary_en: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.
why_it_matters_zh: 这一合作将助力新加坡加速人工智能技术的应用，推动经济发展与公共服务创新。
why_it_matters_en: This partnership will help Singapore accelerate AI adoption, driving economic growth and innovation in public services.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore. Category: business_investment. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 推进内容来源技术，打造更安全透明的AI生态系统
title_en: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
summary_zh: OpenAI通过内容凭证、SynthID和验证工具，推动AI内容来源技术发展，帮助用户识别和信任AI生成的媒体。
summary_en: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.
why_it_matters_zh: 这些技术促进了AI生成内容的透明度与可信度，增强用户对AI媒体的信任，有助于防止错误信息传播。
why_it_matters_en: These technologies enhance transparency and trustworthiness of AI-generated content, helping users identify authentic AI media and preventing misinformation spread.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: OpenAI与戴尔合作，将Codex引入混合及本地企业环境
title_en: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments
summary_zh: OpenAI与戴尔携手，将Codex集成到混合及本地企业环境中，帮助企业在数据和工作流程中安全部署AI编程代理。
summary_en: OpenAI and Dell are partnering to integrate Codex into hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments, enabling enterprises to securely deploy AI coding agents across data and workflows.
why_it_matters_zh: 这一合作能够提升企业利用AI进行编程的安全性和效率，支持更灵活的部署方案，满足企业对数据隐私和控制的需求。
why_it_matters_en: This collaboration enhances the security and efficiency of AI-assisted coding for enterprises, supporting flexible deployment options that meet data privacy and control requirements.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: OpenAI与马耳他合作向全体公民提供ChatGPT Plus
title_en: OpenAI and Malta Partner to Bring ChatGPT Plus to All Citizens
summary_zh: OpenAI与马耳他合作，扩大AI的访问范围，提供ChatGPT Plus及培训，帮助公民构建实用的AI技能并负责任地使用AI。
summary_en: OpenAI partners with Malta to expand AI access by offering ChatGPT Plus and training programs, enabling citizens to develop practical AI skills and use AI responsibly.
why_it_matters_zh: 通过合作，OpenAI使得更多人能够直接体验和学习先进的AI技术，推动社会整体的数字技能提升。
why_it_matters_en: The partnership allows more people to directly experience and learn advanced AI technologies, promoting overall digital skill advancement in society.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: OpenAI and Malta Partner to Bring ChatGPT Plus to All Citizens. Category: models_products. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 数据科学团队如何使用Codex
title_en: How Data Science Teams Use Codex
summary_zh: 了解数据科学团队如何利用Codex，从真实工作输入中构建根因报告、影响评估、关键绩效指标备忘录、范围分析和仪表盘规范。
summary_en: See how data science teams can use Codex to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specs from real work inputs.
why_it_matters_zh: Codex帮助数据科学团队自动化生成关键业务文档，提高效率和准确性。
why_it_matters_en: Codex helps data science teams automate the generation of key business documents, enhancing efficiency and accuracy.

title_zh: Databricks在企业代理工作流中引入GPT-5.5
title_en: Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows
summary_zh: Databricks采用了表现出色的GPT-5.5模型，用于企业代理的工作流程。该模型在OfficeQA Pro基准测试上创下了新的最先进水平。
summary_en: Databricks is leveraging GPT-5.5 for enterprise agent workflows. This model achieved a new state-of-the-art result on the OfficeQA Pro benchmark.
why_it_matters_zh: 引入GPT-5.5能显著提升企业自动化代理的效率和智能水平，助力处理复杂办公任务。
why_it_matters_en: Integrating GPT-5.5 significantly enhances the efficiency and intelligence of enterprise automated agents, aiding in handling complex office tasks.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: ChatGPT 推出全新个人理财体验
title_en: A New Personal Finance Experience in ChatGPT
summary_zh: 面向美国 ChatGPT Pro 用户预览全新的个人理财体验。您可以安全地连接金融账户，获得基于您的财务背景、目标和优先事项的 AI 驱动洞察与指导。
summary_en: Preview a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT for Pro users in the U.S. Securely connect your financial accounts and get AI-powered insights and guidance grounded in your financial context, goals, and priorities.
why_it_matters_zh: 该功能通过结合用户个人财务信息与 AI 技术，帮助用户更好地理解和管理其财务状况，实现个性化理财规划。
why_it_matters_en: This feature leverages users' personal financial data combined with AI technology to help them better understand and manage their finances, enabling personalized financial planning.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: A New Personal Finance Experience in ChatGPT. Category: models_products. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 帮助ChatGPT更好地识别敏感对话中的上下文
title_en: Helping ChatGPT better recognize context in sensitive conversations
summary_zh: 了解最新的ChatGPT安全更新如何提升敏感对话中的上下文感知能力，帮助识别长期风险并更安全地响应。
summary_en: Learn how new ChatGPT safety updates improve context awareness in sensitive conversations, helping detect risk over time and respond more safely.
why_it_matters_zh: 增强上下文识别能力是提升聊天机器人安全性的重要步骤，有助于更准确地理解用户意图，避免误判和潜在风险。
why_it_matters_en: Enhancing context recognition is a crucial step to improve chatbot safety, helping to accurately understand user intent and avoid misjudgments and potential risks.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Helping ChatGPT better recognize context in sensitive conversations. Category: models_products. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
